Package com.google.mu.cel

package com.google.mu.cel
Cel Parser (requires mug-cel artifact)

A modern, light-weight parser for the Common Expression Language:

  • Parses to AST of sealed interfaces and records so that you can use pattern matching.
  • 2x faster than the ANTLR-based cel-java.
  • Tiny foot-print.

Package Specification

The code is developed and tested under Java 21.
  • Class
    Description
    CelExpr
    Abstract representation of a parsed Common Expression Language (CEL) expression.
    CelExpr.Add
    Addition: x + y.
    CelExpr.And
    Logical AND comparison: x && y.
    CelExpr.Binary
    An expression composed by a binary operator.
    CelExpr.BoolValue
    Boolean literal.
    CelExpr.BytesValue
    Byte sequence literal.
    CelExpr.Divide
    Division: x / y.
    CelExpr.DoubleValue
    Double-precision floating point literal.
    CelExpr.Element
     
    CelExpr.Entry<K>
    An entry/field representing a key-value or field-value mapping in map or struct literals.
    CelExpr.EqualTo
    Equality comparison: x == y.
    CelExpr.FunctionCall
    Global function calls f(args).
    CelExpr.GreaterThan
    Greater than relational comparison: x > y.
    CelExpr.GreaterThanOrEqualTo
    Greater than or equal to relational comparison: x >= y.
    CelExpr.Ident
    Variable or symbol lookup (e.g.
    CelExpr.In
    Containment comparison: x in y.
    CelExpr.Index
    Subscript/indexing (e.g.
    CelExpr.LessThan
    Less than relational comparison: x < y.
    CelExpr.LessThanOrEqualTo
    Less than or equal to relational comparison: x <= y.
    CelExpr.ListLiteral
    List creation (e.g.
    CelExpr.LongValue
    Signed 64-bit integer literal.
    CelExpr.Macro
    Abstract representation of a CEL macro expression.
    CelExpr.Macro.All
     
    CelExpr.Macro.Exists
     
    CelExpr.Macro.ExistsOne
     
    CelExpr.Macro.Filter
     
    CelExpr.Macro.FilterMap
     
    CelExpr.Macro.Has
    The has(member) macro.
    CelExpr.Macro.Map
     
    CelExpr.MapLiteral
    Map creation (e.g.
    CelExpr.MemberCall
    Member calls target.f(args).
    CelExpr.Modulo
    Modulo/remainder: x % y.
    CelExpr.Multiply
    Multiplication: x * y.
    CelExpr.Negative
    Unary sign negation: -x.
    CelExpr.Not
    Logical negation: !x.
    CelExpr.NotEqualTo
    Inequality comparison: x != y.
    CelExpr.NullValue
    Null literal.
    CelExpr.OptionalIndex
    Optional subscript/indexing (e.g.
    CelExpr.OptionalSelect
    Optional field selection (e.g.
    CelExpr.Or
    Logical OR comparison: x || y.
    CelExpr.Select
    Field selection (e.g.
    CelExpr.StringValue
    UTF-8 string literal.
    CelExpr.StructLiteral
    Struct/message creation (e.g.
    CelExpr.Subtract
    Subtraction: x - y.
    CelExpr.Ternary
    Ternary conditional (e.g.
    CelExpr.UintValue
    Unsigned 64-bit integer literal.
    CelExpr.Unary
    An expression composed by a unary operator.
    CelParser
    Parser for Common Expression Language (CEL) syntax, producing CelExpr AST records.
